description_long: This is a modern police SUV with a white and blue checkered livery, featuring the word 'POLICE' prominently on the hood and sides. The vehicle is equipped with a roof-mounted emergency light bar displaying red and blue lights, and additional blue lights are visible at the rear. The car has four doors, tinted windows, and silver alloy wheels. The body is primarily white with blue checkered patterns running along the sides, and blue accents on the bumpers. The front grille and headlights are clearly defined, and the rear features blue tail lights and a visible rear bumper. The overall design is robust, suitable for urban law enforcement duties, and includes standard police markings and emergency equipment.
description: A white and blue checkered police SUV with a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, 'POLICE' markings, and detailed emergency features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue checkered pattern, 'POLICE' text, and roof light bar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the 'POLICE' text on the hood and the red and blue roof lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with checkered livery, 'POLICE' text, and emergency lights visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing blue tail lights, rear bumper, and part of the roof light bar.
attribute_police_markings: Blue and white checkered stripe runs along both sides of the vehicle, with the word 'POLICE' in bold blue letters on the front hood and both side doors. Additional blue stripes and checkered patterns are present on the rear bumper.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue segments is centrally placed, and additional blue lights are visible at the rear of the vehicle.
